failed_check.name: Frontend lint, types, and unit tests

root_cause: The Pact consumer test could reach the real getServerApiBaseUrl implementation during full Vitest execution, causing Next.js headers() to run without an App Router request scope.

changes: Mock next/headers inside withServerApi using the Pact mock server host/proto and an empty cookie store.
Remove unused Pact string matcher import.

remaining_notes: Existing lint warnings remain outside this fix scope and do not fail lint.
The fix should be pushed so PR #13 reruns CI.
recommendation: Push the fix commit and re-check PR #13.
